portals.name: LinkedIn Jobs

portals.description: Huge job board — filter by 'Part Time' and 'Student' for flexible roles.

portals.description: UK's largest graduate and student job platform with internship schemes.

portals.description: Europe's leading student & graduate job platform connected to universities.

portals.name: Make-it-in-Germany

portals.description: Top student job platform in France — stages (internships) and alternances.

portals.name: APEC
portals.description: French executive and graduate job portal — great for high-level internships.

portals.name: Seek

portals.description: HK's leading job board — broad listings from finance to retail for students.

portals.description: Salary-transparent internship and grad job listings in HK.
